title: Better Than Armadillos
description: Adds verious things to Minecraft eg, uranium, rubies,carpenter villigers ect.
body:
Prepare to embark on an extraordinary Minecraft adventure with ExpandedCraft, a mod that pushes the boundaries of your blocky world. This immersive modification introduces a host of new elements that will both challenge and delight players as they venture into a world filled with mystery and discovery.

Key Features:

Uranium: Delve deep into the darkest corners of your world to uncover uranium, a precious and radioactive resource. With it, you can craft a formidable regular pistol that will give you an edge as you face the challenges of Minecraft survival.

Rubies: Scattered across the landscape, rubies are precious gemstones that can be mined, traded, and used for various purposes. While they can't be crafted into armor, rubies are invaluable for creating dazzling tools and other unique items that will set you apart in the Minecraft universe.

The Ruined Dimension: Step into the eerie and desolate realm known as the Ruined Dimension. This haunting place is devoid of ores, mobs, and structures, presenting a unique challenge for survival. To access this enigmatic dimension, you must construct a portal using trash blocks and light it with the Ruined Dimension Portal Igniter, a rare drop always obtained from Pigmen.

Pigmen and the Pigman Summoner Block: Interact with the curious Pigmen using the Pigman Summoner Block. When right-clicked, it summons one Pigman at a time before becoming inactive. Pigmen in this mod serve one purpose: to walk and, if provoked, attack. Their sole valuable contribution is the coveted Ruined Dimension Portal Igniter they drop upon defeat.

ExpandedCraft opens up a world of possibilities for Minecraft players. Whether you're a seasoned miner, an adventurous explorer, or a creative builder, this mod offers something to elevate your gameplay experience. Unlock the secrets of the Ruined Dimension, harness the power of uranium for your arsenal, and wield the beauty of rubies in your creations.

Incorporate ExpandedCraft into your Minecraft journey today and witness how it transforms your favorite sandbox adventure into an epic quest filled with wonder and challenge. Your next adventure in Minecraft awaits, so download the mod and begin crafting your destiny!
